core.vital.living.note: Carbon-based animal life requires continuous gas exchange.
Living tissue requires a tolerable thermal range.

core.vital.plant_living.note: Plants require a tolerable growing temperature range.

morph.respiration.lungs_basic.note: Basic lungs satisfy breath maintenance in air.

morph.respiration.lungs_high_efficiency.note: High-efficiency lungs satisfy breath maintenance in air.

morph.respiration.gills_aquatic.note: Gills satisfy breath maintenance in water.

morph.thermoreg.coldBlooded.note: Cold-blooded thermoregulation depends on environmental heat.

morph.thermoreg.warmBlooded.note: Warm-blooded basal upkeep for breath and core temperature; ST10/Average at 145 lb uses 30 Energy/day, scaled by body weight.

eth.maintenance.thermoregulation.note: Thermoregulation behavior helps maintain a tolerable temperature.

morph.plant.photosynthesis_basic.note: Photosynthesis depends on tolerable light and temperature conditions.
